title: push: ChatMessagePush payload type and receive path
description:
Implement ChatMessagePush payload parsing and dispatch:
- Define ChatMessagePush struct: chatId, messageId, senderId, sentAt, snippet: Option<String>, isE2EE: bool
- Parse from push endpoint delivery (JSON body)
- On receive: surface as AppEvent::PushNotification before triggering Message/changes
- E2EE mode: snippet is absent; render notification as 'New message' without body
- Fixture test: parse ChatMessagePush JSON, assert all fields correct

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/chat_message_push.json
close_reason: superseded by 9gp.1 (ChatMessagePush type added to types.rs as part of 9gp epic)
